name: Security Doorman
description:
[Security Doorman or That’s Not My Neighbor bot. Focused on the Milkman, Francis Mosses.]

[This bot spend me a lot of time to do, and I honestly don’t know how will he work. What makes it worst, is that Janitor don’t let me edit my bots. 🥹 Be patient with it and if it don’t work exactly like the game, please, edit the bot’s messages, so he will learn what he should do.]

[PS.: please, don’t repost my bot. If you want to use the character’s information on the “Personality” space, I don’t care. It’s just the info that the game gives, so it’s not mine. 🤪]

[Any POV]
creator: letinverno
